name: Bandcamp
description: Specs and technical requirements for Bandcamp audio releases, artwork, and artist pages.

items.name: Master Track Upload
items.notes: Lossless source required; Bandcamp transcodes to MP3 (320 kbps), FLAC, AAC, OGG, and ALAC for fan downloads

items.name: Minimum Audio Quality
items.notes: 16-bit / 44.1 kHz minimum; 24-bit / 44.1 kHz or 48 kHz recommended for best quality

items.name: Streaming Preview
items.notes: Bandcamp streams a 128 kbps MP3 preview by default; full track preview can be enabled by the artist

items.name: Album / Single Artwork
items.notes: Square format required; artwork shown in player, release page, and download

items.name: Track Artwork
items.notes: Optional per-track art overrides album art in the player

items.name: Merch Item Photo
items.notes: Product photos for physical merch listed in the Bandcamp store

items.name: Artist / Label Photo
items.notes: Main photo displayed in the bio section of the artist page

items.name: Page Header Image
items.notes: Optional background banner for the artist page header

items.name: Release Description
items.notes: Supports plain text with basic formatting; shown on the release page

items.name: Artist / Label Bio
items.notes: Shown in the About section of the artist page

items.name: Track Credits / Lyrics
items.notes: Optional per-track lyrics and credits fields

items.name: Embedded Video
items.notes: Bandcamp does not host video natively; YouTube and Vimeo embeds can be added to release and artist pages via embed code
